name: Recurrent superblock + mixed int5/int6 + LZMA (non-TTT)
val_bpb_notes: Fill with sliding-window BPB (EVAL_STRIDE) after run; report 3-seed mean ± std for leaderboard.
blurb: 6 physical blocks unrolled to 12 virtual layers with shared Q/K/V/O/MLP; per-virtual RMSNorm, residual gates, rank-8 adapters; LeakyReLU(0.5)^2; XSA; partial RoPE; optional BigramHash; EMA; STE QAT aligned to mixed int5/int6 rowwise export + LZMA. No TTT.
author: jago
